parameters.subject: Reminder: Invoice #{{ $json.InvoiceNumber }} is Overdue
parameters.text:
Dear {{ $json.ClientName }},

This is a friendly reminder that invoice #{{ $json.InvoiceNumber }} for ${{ $json.Amount }} was due on {{ $json.DueDate }} and is now {{ $json.daysOverdue }} days overdue.

You can view and pay the invoice here: {{ $json.PaymentLink }}

Please let us know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Your Billing Team

parameters.values:
=[
  [
    new Date().toISOString(),
    "Email sent",
    $node["Filter Overdue Invoices"].json.InvoiceNumber,
    $node["Filter Overdue Invoices"].json.ClientEmail
  ]
]
